final:
module RefModule (
	input clk,
	input reset,
	input load,
	input [15:0] data_in,
	output reg [15:0] data_out);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
	if (reset) begin
		data_out <= 16'b0000000000000000;
	end else if (load) begin
		data_out <= data_in;
	end
end

endmodule
